hero.name: Manikanta Handral

hero.intro: Building intelligent systems, scalable web applications, and data-driven solutions.

about.title: About Me
about.lead: I'm Manikanta Handral, an engineer who loves turning complex problems into elegant, intelligent products.
about.body: My work sits at the intersection of artificial intelligence, full-stack engineering and data science. I enjoy designing systems end to end — from clean, accessible interfaces to robust APIs and the data pipelines and models that power them. I care deeply about performance, maintainability and shipping experiences that feel effortless to use.

education.title: Education
education.description: Background in Computer Science with a strong focus on artificial intelligence, machine learning and modern software engineering practices.

careerGoals.title: Career Goals
careerGoals.description: To build AI-powered products that create real-world impact, while growing as an engineer who bridges research, data and scalable application development.

skills.title: Skills & Technologies
skills.subtitle: A snapshot of the languages, frameworks and tools I work with across AI, the web and data.
